# Martin Make

> Indie app studio from Santiago, Chile. We design, build, and ship apps that solve real problems.

## About

Martin Make is a solo indie studio founded by Martín Campos. We create mobile apps, web apps, and desktop software across multiple industries: energy, music production, and archaeology.

## Products

- [Wattai](https://wattai.app): Energy consumption calculator with AI scanning. Available on iOS and Android.
- [Pad Works](https://padworks.io): Expansion kit generator for Akai MPC. 6 export formats. Desktop app, $39.
- [Lithic](https://lithic-ai-landing.vercel.app): AI-powered archaeological analysis for lithics, metals, and ceramics.

## Services

- Brand Design: Visual identity, logo, palette, typography, brand kit.
- Web Design: Landing pages, portfolios, product sites.
- Web Apps: Dashboards, tools, platforms.
- Mobile Apps: iOS and Android, from concept to App Store.

## Contact

- Email: hola@martinmake.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/MARTINMRVS
- Location: Santiago, Chile
